title: How to Setting Up NOWPayments Webhooks: The Complete Creator Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in a restricted country like Nigeria or Iran, you know the frustration of being cut off from major payment platforms like PayPal. You've got a great ebook or course to sell, but no way to get paid. That's where NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce come in - a powerful combo that lets you sell digital products without the need for traditional payment processors.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The problem with traditional payment processors is that they often come with strict KYC requirements and geographical restrictions. But with NOWPayments, you can accept payments in over 300 cryptocurrencies, with no KYC required. This opens up a whole new world of possibilities for digital creators who've been locked out of the traditional payment ecosystem. By leveraging the power of crypto, you can sell your digital products to anyone, anywhere in the world.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you can start selling with NOWPayments, you'll need to set up a few key things. First, you'll need to create a NOWPayments account and generate an API key. You'll also need to have a digital product ready to sell, whether that's an ebook, course, or software. Finally, you'll need to integrate the NOWPayments webhook into your website or sales funnel, which will allow you to automate delivery of your digital products.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, you'll need to configure the NOWPayments webhook to work with your digital product. This involves specifying the product details, setting the price, and defining the delivery mechanism. You can use a tool like the Core Shop Engine to streamline this process and automate delivery of your products. With the right setup, you can start selling your digital products and getting paid in crypto, all without the need for traditional payment processors.
Sell digital products without traditional payment processors!
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've got your payment and delivery pipeline set up, it's time to go live and start selling. This involves creating a sales page for your digital product, configuring the NOWPayments payment gateway, and testing the entire process to make sure it works smoothly. When you make your first sale, you'll receive the payment in crypto, which you can then exchange for fiat currency or hold onto as an investment. The key is to have a solid understanding of the process and to be prepared to troubleshoot any issues that arise.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As you start to make sales and grow your business, you'll need to think about scaling your operation. This involves optimizing your sales funnel, improving your marketing efforts, and streamlining your delivery process. You can use tools like the Admin Dashboard to track your sales and analytics, and make data-driven decisions to grow your business. With the right strategy and tools in place, you can turn your digital product business into a thriving enterprise that generates passive income and freedom.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The best platform to sell digital downloads without fees is one that uses crypto payments, like NOWPayments. With crypto, you can avoid the high fees associated with traditional payment processors and keep more of your hard-earned money. Plus, with the right tools and setup, you can automate delivery of your digital products and streamline your sales process.

Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling digital products using NOWPayments, follow these steps: set up a NOWPayments account and generate an API key, create a digital product to sell, integrate the NOWPayments webhook into your website or sales funnel, configure the payment and delivery pipeline, test the entire process, and go live. You can also use tools like the Core Shop Engine to automate delivery of your products and streamline your sales process.
